explanation: The Sigma rule relies on the CommandLine ending exactly with '.rdp' or '.rdp"'. By appending a valid command-line switch like '/f' (Full Screen) or '/public' at the end of the command, the string no longer ends with the targeted extensions, bypassing the 'selection_cli' condition.

Adding a trailing whitespace character at the very end of the command line string will cause the 'CommandLine|endswith' string-matching condition to evaluate to false, evading detection while still executing the file.
